calendar.matters:
Petition For Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Successor Trustee; For Order Directing Delivery Of Trust Assets To Successor Trustee And Compelling Trustee To Account;
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Espey for and with Karen Livingston (Petitioner).

The Court noted that Lisa Livingstone is not present. Ms. Espey stated that they have not heard anything from her. The Court noted that the file shows full service on her, that she is not here to defend this matter, stated that the statutory language concerning service is not clear, that it seems to suggest service on a Trustee does not need to be personal service and that it sees no reason to not go ahead and grant the petition at this point. Ms. Livingstone stated that she thinks ordering Lisa to account would not be helpful and would not get results. The Court granted the Petition for Removal of Trustee and Appointment of Successor Trustee, etc. (subject to review of the order). The Court will not order an accounting at this time without prejudice to the parties seeking additional information later or filing a request for an accounting.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
